scope: Record the final post-checkpoint runtime experiment result and preserve the medium portfolio checkpoint as the current best handoff

decision_context.prior_state: The medium-depth full-universe checkpoint was the best committed state, but there was still a question of whether one more simulation-side optimization could justify a deeper rerun.
decision_context.decision: Test the narrow signal-decay precompute idea with the tiny full-universe benchmark, reject it when runtime regresses sharply, and preserve the medium checkpoint as the best current state.
decision_context.why_now: Without a written stop condition, the session would appear to end mid-experiment even though the final optimization idea was measured and rejected.

files_expected.purpose: Records the failed runtime experiment, the measured regression, and the resulting stop condition.
Captures why the final runtime experiment was tested and why it was rejected.
Adds the stop-condition tranche to the running day-level diff log.

planned_steps: Measure the final simulation-side optimization idea with the tiny full-universe benchmark
Revert the experiment if it regresses runtime
Write the stop-condition note and update the day-level diff summary

commands: $env:PYTHONPATH='src'; python -c "from chip_labs.mirofish.portfolio import run_full_portfolio_evaluation; import time; t=time.time(); run_full_portfolio_evaluation(max_rounds=2, flagship_count_per_type=1, ensemble_runs=1, ensemble_count_per_type=1, min_runs=1, bootstrap_resamples=5); print(round(time.time()-t,2))"
expected_checks: The benchmark makes clear whether the proposed optimization is directionally better or worse than the committed runtime path
If the optimization is rejected, the regression suite still passes after reverting it
The final note states that the medium checkpoint remains the best committed handoff

guardrails: Do not promote the rejected optimization into a code commit
Do not replace the committed medium checkpoint with an unvalidated deeper run
Keep the handoff anchored to the last validated artifact set
